name: I slipped and fell at work in Salt Lake City but it was my own clumsiness - can I still get workers comp?
description: Yes in Utah if workplace like hard floor made injuries worse, even if fall was idiopathic.[3]

mainEntity.name: I slipped and fell at work in Salt Lake City but it was my own clumsiness - can I still get workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes in Utah if workplace like hard floor made injuries worse, even if fall was idiopathic.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Idiopathic falls at work in Utah may be compensable if workplace conditions like a hard floor worsened the injury.[3] Context: Utah courts require showing that work increased the risk or aggravated the harm from a personal fall.[3] Key factors: Prove the fall originated internally but job site made injuries worse; no need for employer fault.[3][4] Practical guidance: Document medical records linking floor hardness to injury severity; file claim promptly with Utah Labor Commission. Consult a workers comp attorney to build causation evidence. Utah law favors compensability if employment contributed.[3]
